subcodes.first_line: O My handmaidens! Verily, ye have been created for purity; hold ye fast unto it through My command that transcendeth all things, and I am the All-Forgiving [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امائی قد خلقتن للعصمه تمسکن بها بامری المتعالی علی الاشیا و انا الغفور
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God
